title: Bridge Essay: From many to (n)one: Meditation and the plasticity of the predictive mind.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.

**From many to (n)one: Meditation and the plasticity of the predictive mind.** — Neurosci Biobehav Rev. PMID: 34139248. DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2021.06.021. How profoundly can humans change their own minds? In this paper we offer aunifying account of deconstructive meditation under the predictive processing view. We start from simple axioms. First, the brain makes predictions based on past experience, both phylogenetic and ontogenetic. Second, deconstructive meditation brings one closer to the here and now by disengaging anticipatory processes.
